title: The Problem with AI Agents No One is Talking About | Yutori, Abhishek Das
summary: Abhishek Das, co-founder of Yutori, argues that most AI agents are unreliable because error compounding across multi-step workflows breaks performance. He contends the agent industry has normalized this unreliability and advocates for prioritizing reliable agents that work on the first try, emphasizing taste and proof-of-work practices over raw performance metrics.
